kw.name: Reqres API
Create Dictionary
kw.msg: &{headers} = { x-api-key=reqres-free-v1 }
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=reqres, url=https://reqres.in/api/, headers={'x-api-key': 'reqres-free-v1'}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://reqres.in/api/users path_url=/api/users headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'x-api-key': 'reqres-free-v1'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.msg: ${response} = ('PASS', <Response [200]>)
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: msg=A valid method need to be choosed: GET, PUT, POST, DELETE
kw.doc: Stops the whole test execution.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.msg: ${has_status_code} = True
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Status code: 200 | Response text: {"page":1,"per_page":6,"total":12,"total_pages":2,"data":[{"id":1,"email":"george.bluth@reqres.in","first_name":"George","last_name":"Bluth","avatar":"https://reqres.in/img/faces/1-image.jpg"},{"id":2,"email":"janet.weaver@reqres.in","first_name":"Janet","last_name":"Weaver","avatar":"https://reqres.in/img/faces/2-image.jpg"},{"id":3,"email":"emma.wong@reqres.in","first_name":"Emma","last_name":"Wong","avatar":"https://reqres.in/img/faces/3-image.jpg"},{"id":4,"email":"eve.holt@reqres.in","first_name":"Eve","last_name":"Holt","avatar":"https://reqres.in/img/faces/4-image.jpg"},{"id":5,"email":"charles.morris@reqres.in","first_name":"Charles","last_name":"Morris","avatar":"https://reqres.in/img/faces/5-image.jpg"},{"id":6,"email":"tracey.ramos@reqres.in","first_name":"Tracey","last_name":"Ramos","avatar":"https://reqres.in/img/faces/6-image.jpg"}],"support":{"url":"https://contentcaddy.io?utm_source=reqres&utm_medium=json&utm_campaign=referral","text":"Tired of writing endless social media content? Let Content Caddy generate it for you."}}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: If method is PUT, ${data} must be in dict "{}" format.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://reqres.in/api/users/23 path_url=/api/users/23 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'x-api-key': 'reqres-free-v1'} body=None
HTTPError: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: https://reqres.in/api/users/23

kw.status: HTTPError: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: https://reqres.in/api/users/23

kw.msg: ${response} = ('FAIL', 'HTTPError: 404 Client Error: Not Found for url: https://reqres.in/api/users/23')
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Fatal Error
kw.arg: msg=A valid method need to be choosed: GET, PUT, POST, DELETE

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Log
kw.msg: Resolving variable '${response[1].status_code}' failed: AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'status_code'
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.status: Resolving variable '${response[1].status_code}' failed: AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'status_code'

kw.msg: ${has_status_code} = False
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.
